LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. -- AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF IMPLIED DUTY) IS GRANTED. AS PLAINTIFF'S TORT CLAIM IS BASED ON THE BREACH OF CONTRACT, THE ONLY ACT GIVING RISE TO "INJURY" IS THE MARCH 25, 2005 EOB LETTER CONFIRMING THE AMOUNT DEFENDANT WAS WILLING TO PAY OR NOT PAY ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ON THIS CLAIM WAS IN 2007. CCP SECTION 17208. THEREFORE, THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAD PAST BEFORE PLAINTIFF FILED THIS SUIT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE REMAINING CLAIMS BASED ON THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IS DENIED. IT IS ALSO DENIED ON DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENT THAT PLAINTIFF LACKS STANDING BECAUSE HE SUFFERED NO MONEY DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED HARM IS HAVING TO PAY FOR SERVICES THEY DID NOT RECEIVE FROM DEFENDANT AND FOR BEING SUBJECT TO FEES FOR THE OUT-OF-NETWORK CARE WHILE PLAINTIFF WAS AT THE IN-NETWORK HOSPITAL. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS ALSO DENIED ON THE BASIS THAT PLAINTIFF LACKS STANDING TO REQUEST DECLARATORY AND INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. COURT SIGNED FOUR ORDERS ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER ON MOTION. [NOTE: THIS LAW & MOTION MATTER HEARD WITH DISCOVERY MOTION ON 9:00AM CALENDAR (THEREFORE NOT REPORTED).] JUDGE: LORETTA M. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

APPEARANCES: Ron K. Bochner, Esq. of Law Offices of Ron Bochner 408/200-9890 for pltfs & opposing parties; John Nadolenco, Esq. 213/229-9500 & Kristen A. Rowse, Esq. 213/229-5137 of Mayer Brown LLP for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED.
DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF IMPLIED DUTY) IS GRANTED. AS PLAINTIFF'S TORT CLAIM IS BASED ON THE BREACH OF CONTRACT, THE ONLY ACT GIVING RISE TO "INJURY" IS THE MARCH 25, 2005 EOB LETTER CONFIRMING THE AMOUNT DEFENDANT WAS WILLING TO PAY OR NOT PAY ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS ON THIS CLAIM WAS IN 2007. CCP SECTION 17208. THEREFORE, THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAD PAST BEFORE PLAINTIFF FILED THIS SUIT.
DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE REMAINING CLAIMS BASED ON THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IS DENIED. IT IS ALSO DENIED ON DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENT THAT PLAINTIFF LACKS STANDING BECAUSE HE SUFFERED NO MONEY DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED HARM IS HAVING TO PAY FOR SERVICES THEY DID NOT RECEIVE FROM DEFENDANT AND FOR BEING SUBJECT TO FEES FOR THE OUT-OF-NETWORK CARE WHILE PLAINTIFF WAS AT THE IN-NETWORK HOSPITAL. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS ALSO DENIED ON THE BASIS THAT PLAINTIFF LACKS STANDING TO REQUEST DECLARATORY AND INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. Court signed four orders on defendant's objections. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order on motion. [Note: This law & motion matter heard with discovery motion on 9:00am calendar (therefore not reported).] Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
